title: WaitSig Statement
parameters:
signalNumber	Integer expression representing signal number to receive.  Range is from 0 to 63.

timeOut	Optional.  Real expression representing the maximum time to wait.
description: Use WaitSig to wait for a signal from another task.  The signal will only be received after WaitSig has started. Previous signals are ignored.
see_also:
Wait

WaitPos

Signal

WaitSig Example

Function Main

  Xqt SubTask

  Wait 1

  Signal 1

Fend

Function SubTask

  WaitSig 1

  Print "signal received"

  .

Fend
examples:
Function Main Xqt SubTask Wait 1 Signal 1
Fend

Function SubTask WaitSig 1 Print "signal received" .
Fend
